visual_description: A bald man in a dark suit stands with his back to the camera, looking at rows of aquarium tanks. The view shifts to show a smiling man in a suit and green checkered tie extending his arm toward a woman with curly dark hair wearing a red and black patterned dress. The woman smiles and looks to the side as the man stands beside her.
audio_description: A male voice speaks briefly in a calm tone, followed by a short pause.
